name: Feta Stuffed Pasta Shells
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pot of boiling water, cook pasta shells as directed on the package (until al dente).
2. Rinse the cooked shells in cold water and drain well.
3. Arrange the shells on a large microwave-safe serving dish.
4. In a bowl, combine feta cheese, red pepper, olives, walnuts, parsley, and oregano.
5. Fill each pasta shell with about 1 tablespoon of the feta mixture using a toothpick to skewer it in place.
6. Microwave the stuffed shells at medium (50%) power for 4 to 5 minutes or until heated through.
Fat grams per serving: Approximately
Cook Time: 5 minutes
